database_boundary.migration_reason: AiphaBee must remain independently movable when IPO, HK F10, serving, lineage, or usage-ledger data creates capacity, PITR, replica, or database-engine migration pressure.

hyperdrive.smoke_test: Run read-only SELECT 1 through Hyperdrive after resource provisioning.

commands.name: create_migration
commands.command: create timestamped SQL file in supabase/migrations

commands.name: dry_run_remote
commands.command: review migration SQL against PLANETSCALE_DATABASE_URL without committed secrets

migrations.purpose: Create non-market-data schemas and default-deny governance controls used by later data-access slices.
Create empty security master and immutable raw snapshot scaffolds for Sprint 1.1 without loading partner or market data.
Create empty financial facts and restatement scaffolds for Sprint 1.1 without loading partner or market data.
Create empty corporate action and price adjustment scaffolds for Sprint 1.1 without loading partner or market data.

Create empty Serving Store projection scaffolds for Sprint 1.1 without enabling live Serving reads or loading partner market data.
Create empty Evidence and Lineage service scaffolds for Sprint 1.2 without enabling live DB writes or loading partner source records.
Create an empty subscription lifecycle audit event scaffold for Sprint 2.4 without enabling billing provider calls or live writes.
Create empty subscription invoice and invoice-line scaffolds that trace billing rows to usage ledger entries and request IDs without enabling live billing provider reads or writes.
Create an empty high-cost usage credit reservation scaffold that links estimates, pre-debit entries, failure refunds, and request IDs without enabling live ledger writes.
Create empty Workflow task and checkpoint scaffolds for resumable long-running Agent tasks without enabling live Workflows execution or persistent writes.
Create empty deep report snapshot and evidence index scaffolds linked to Workflow tasks without enabling live Workflows execution, R2 writes, or persistent report writes.
Create empty watchlist and alert rule/event scaffolds for price, announcement, and metric reminders without enabling live notification fanout or persistent writes.
Create empty watchlist briefing and briefing-item scaffolds for daily and weekly summaries without enabling live notification fanout or persistent writes.
Create empty data correction event, saved-report impact, and user notification scaffolds without enabling live notification fanout or persistent writes.
Create empty MCP credential revocation enforcement scaffolds without enabling live auth enforcement or persistent writes.
Create empty Agent kill switch state and governance scaffolds without enabling live flag reads or persistent writes.
Create empty authorized session memory scaffolds for user-visible view, edit, and remove planning without enabling live reads or persistent writes.
Create empty security name, industry, and index constituent history scaffolds for point-in-time lookup without enabling live data access.
Create empty restricted export request, audit event, and governance scaffolds for CSV, image, and PDF planning without enabling live artifact writes.
Create empty Pro and Developer package pricing catalog, entitlement bundle, and governance scaffolds without enabling live pricing or billing provider calls.
Create empty public status component, public document publication, and governance scaffolds without enabling live incident feeds or live publication writes.
